title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Fyers - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Fyers - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, Fyers in Bhopal is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Fyers:
Fyers is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fyers!
